headline: Eli Lilly to Expand Vaccine Pipeline With Three Biotech Buyouts
summary: LLY plans $3.83B in biotech buyouts to expand into vaccines and infectious diseases beyond obesity and diabetes.

raw.headline: Eli Lilly to Expand Vaccine Pipeline With Three Biotech Buyouts
raw.summary: LLY plans $3.83B in biotech buyouts to expand into vaccines and infectious diseases beyond obesity and diabetes.

headline: This Biotech Stock Is Stuck in the Red. Its Cancer Portfolio Is About to Change the Narrative.
summary: BioNTech’s  future rests entirely on the success of its pipeline, now that its pandemic-era glory days are firmly in the rearview mirror.  Wall Street is betting the company’s next act in oncology will be worth the wait.  UBS analyst David Dai moved off the sidelines Wednesday as he upgraded  BioNTech  stock to Buy from Neutral with a $135 price target, up from $117.

headline: Kardigan targets IPO to support cardiology pipeline progression
summary: Kardigan plans to use the IPO funds to push its three in-licensed, mid-to-late-stage heart health therapies further down the clinical pipeline.

raw.headline: Kardigan targets IPO to support cardiology pipeline progression

headline: Pfizer Bets on New & Acquired Drugs to Offset Its LOE Pressure?
summary: PFE is banking on new launches, Seagen assets and pipeline progress to counter a looming patent cliff through 2030.

raw.headline: Pfizer Bets on New & Acquired Drugs to Offset Its LOE Pressure?
raw.summary: PFE is banking on new launches, Seagen assets and pipeline progress to counter a looming patent cliff through 2030.

headline: Cardio drugmaker Kardigan plans to go public
summary: Founded by former MyoKardia executives, the startup has in mid- to late-stage testing three medicines licensed from the likes of Sanofi, Ionis and Bristol Myers Squibb.

headline: Bristol-Myers Squibb Is Quietly Building Its Next Growth Cycle
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company targets upper-end 2026 guidance on Breyanzi, Camzyos & Reblozyl growth; ASCO 2026 catalysts ahead. Click for this BMY update.
